content.en:
"Raise the Origin Rule of the Other Shore to the realm of ninety percent seven!"

Ye Tian frowned.

He didn't have such a treasure in his hands now, only the copy body in the Void Treasure Land of the Ruins of Reincarnation.

If you want to bring it out, you can only go to the Void Treasure Land again, and then let the copy body of the Void Treasure Land leave the treasure in one place, let your copy body find it, and then bring it back.

And this method, half of the resources have to be handed over to the Ancient Heavenly Palace.

But for the sake of the Origin Ancestral Order, this method can only be used.

"Okay, I can get some resources that will help improve the rules of the Origin on the other side, and it will also help you, give me a little time. Ye Tian said.

"Okay, I'll give you some time!"

The Lord of Kunchi agreed.

If Ye Tian could really come up with such resources, he would naturally agree, but he didn't think that Ye Tian would be able to do it.

......

Ancient Heavenly Palace.

Ye Tian applied to enter the ruins of reincarnation again, and for Ye Tian's application, the Ancient Heavenly Palace naturally agreed.

Now, very few Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors were willing to enter the Void Treasure Land of the Ruins of Reincarnation, after all, it was too dangerous.

But there were still too many dangers in that treasure land, and there was no way to solve them by relying on the Ancient Heavenly Palace alone, and they had to recruit the Origin Upper Realm to deal with it.

Therefore, they welcomed Ye Tian very much.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to enter the ruins of reincarnation and was sent to the Void Treasure Land.

Afterwards.

He went in again.

At the same time, Ye Tian's other copy body placed some resources that would help improve the Origin Rules of the other side everywhere, waiting for him to pick it up.

In doing so, the Desolate Blood Ancestor would only think that he was lucky and would not doubt it.

The years passed.

Ye Tian transferred the resources to this replica body little by little, and gradually, he collected enough resources.

"It should be almost, the Lord of Kunchi should be willing to trade, if he is still unwilling to trade, I will find other Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors who have the Origin Ancestor Order to trade. "

Subsequently.

Ye Tian came out of the Void Treasure Land, and after paying half of the resources, he came out of the ruins of reincarnation.

After that, he came to the Lord of Kunchi again.

......

"Lord of Kunchi, these resources will help improve the Origin Rules on the other side!"

Ye Tian said.

The Lord of Kunchi had seen so many resources, most of which he knew, and it really helped him improve the Origin Rules of the Other Side.

However, he saw that Ye Tian had gathered so many resources in such a short time, and maybe he could get more resources.

So, he acted as a question: "Endless Lord, these resources can indeed improve the origin rules of the other side, but they may not be able to help me improve the origin rules of the other side from ninety to six to ninety-seven, if it is added by another third, I am willing to trade." "

"Lord of Kunchi, if you are not willing to trade, then forget it, I can't find other Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors to trade. "

As he spoke, Ye Tian was about to leave.

Seeing that Ye Tian was leaving, the Lord of Kunchi panicked, and hurriedly said: "Lord of Endless, don't worry, less is less, I am willing to trade." "

"Good!"

Ye Tian didn't talk nonsense, and quickly completed the transaction with the Lord of Kunchi and took this Origin Ancestral Order.

Wind Tooth Island.

Ye Tian came back, and when the Lord of the Wind Fang knew that Ye Tian had obtained the Origin Ancestral Order, they were shocked one by one.

"Endless Lord, you actually traded the Origin Ancestral Order!" the Lord of Wind Fang was shocked.

"As long as the price paid is enough, there will be a Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor who is willing to take it out and trade. Ye Tian smiled.

"Endless Lord, with your current strength and talent, you should have the hope of obtaining a Origin Ancestral Body Method on the other side!" said the Lord of Ice and Rain.

"Hopefully!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

Subsequently.

He began to refine the Origin Ancestral Order, and soon after the refining was completed, he was ready to use the Origin Ancestral Order to enter the Origin Ancestral Mountain.

The Origin Ancestral Mountain is said to be in a special area of the ruins of reincarnation, and it is impossible to go there without special methods, and the Origin Ancestral Order is a shortcut to enter the Origin Ancestral Mountain, so there are so many Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors who want to obtain the Origin Ancestral Order.

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian urged the Origin Ancestral Order.

The next moment.

Airplanes!!!!

The Origin Ancestral Order wrapped Ye Tian, crossed endless time and space, entered the ruins of reincarnation, and crossed the long territory of the ruins of reincarnation, and came to an unknown place, that is, the Origin Ancestral Mountain.

......

Rumble!!!!

The suppression in the dark came, making Ye Tian a little uncomfortable, and it took a while to get used to it.

"This is the Origin Ancestral Mountain!"

Ye Tian looked around, and there was a black mist.

"Black Mist ......"

Ye Tian felt a little familiar, the black mist at the core of the Void Treasure Land was very similar, maybe not a place, but definitely a substance.

"If you don't have the Origin Ancestor Order, if you want to enter the Origin Ancestor Mountain, you have to pass through this black mist area, and the top Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor can't do it, and if you touch it, you have to fall!" Ye Tian said darkly.

He didn't care about these black mists, but walked towards the Origin Ancestral Mountain.

Soon.

He saw a huge stone tablet, suppressing the endless eternal time and space, and in front of the stone tablet, there were three Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors sitting here.

Ye Tian didn't disturb these three Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors, he also sat in front of the stone tablet, and his consciousness probed into the stone tablet.

"The Origin Ancestor Body of the Other Shore - the body of Gengxu, is ranked ordinary!"

Ye Tian didn't stay here and continued to move forward.

Before he came, he also inquired about the information about the Origin Ancestral Mountain, no matter who it was, he could only stay in the Origin Ancestral Mountain for a total of 10 million primeval eras, and after 10 million primeval eras, no matter whether or not he obtained the Origin Ancestral Body Method on the other side, he would be excluded, and no one could be an exception.

And there is not only one kind of Origin Ancestor on the other side of the Origin Ancestral Mountain, but there are many kinds.

These other Origin Ancestors are also divided into three grades, ordinary, top, and supreme.

Each of the other side of the origin ancestral body has an assessment, if you can't complete the assessment, you will definitely not be able to get the inheritance.

Ye Tian didn't look down on the ordinary Origin Ancestral Body Method on the other side, and he didn't want to participate in its assessment, his goal was to supreme the Origin Ancestral Body Method on the other side.

Soon.

Ye Tian came to the second Origin Ancestor Body Method Tablet on the other side, but this time it was the top Origin Ancestor Body Method on the other side, and there was only one Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor here who was conducting the assessment.

And Ye Tian couldn't look down on this Origin Ancestral Body Method on the other side.

After some searching, Ye Tian finally found the Supreme Origin Ancestral Body Method on the top of the mountain.

The Origin Ancestor of the Other Shore - the body of reincarnation Haotian, ranked highest!

Seeing this Origin Ancestral Body Method on the other side, Ye Tian made a decision, and he had this Origin Ancestral Body Method on the other side!
